query: lens flare halation light leak film photograph
message: anti-aesthetic / color_and_tone / chromatic_aberration — halation, light leaks, lo-fi optical color streaks

response.objective_caption: Railway tracks converge and recede toward the horizon at night, flanked by gravel beds and wooden railroad ties. Overhead electrical wires and metal support towers line both sides of the corridor. Bright lights glow in the distance, producing starburst patterns and reflecting off the metal rails. The surrounding ground and infrastructure fall into deep shadow.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: Railway tracks converge and recede toward the horizon at night, flanked by gravel beds and wooden railroad ties beneath overhead electrical wires and metal support towers. Bright lights glow in the distance with starburst flares, reflecting off the metal rails. A sickly orange-red cast shifts surfaces toward unsettling warm hues, while the dark industrial corridor and deep shadows evoke atmospheric distress and unease.
